gigapan.description:
SIGGRAPH Studio - Wearables and Inflatables.

The inflatables are designed on a computer, and then the pattern is projected onto the wall where the participants cut out plastic material based on the projected pattern.  They then weld the plastic together with heat, with an opening at the bottom where the piece can be fitted onto an air blower so that it can blow about and entertain everyone.  The wearables involve conductive thread and shiny things, and multiple degrees of awesome.
